title: Look Love Me Dear Song Lyrics Simla Special
stanzas: <div>Look Love Me Dear Song Lyrics Simla Special

look love me dear,
lovely figure, lasting colour,
venmaegamae odivaa

thaenkonda poovae thaedi vaa
naan konja vaendum naadi vaa

kaadhal ennangal
neeradum oadai.
kanni poomaeni
kan kaattum jaadai (2)

koondal mael nindru
oonjal pol indru
kaatru vilayadum
naal allavo

oh ! love me dear
leave me never
hold me ever
venmaegamae odivaa

vaanam thaen sindhu
yaavum naan thandhu
neeyum kaviyaagum
pozhuthallavo

o look love me dear,
lovely figure, lasting colour,
venmaegamae odivaa

thaenkonda poovae thaedi vaa
naan konja vaendum naadi vaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Look Love Me Dear?

The song is a romantic melody that expresses longing and affection.

In which movie does the song Look Love Me Dear appear?

The song is featured in the movie Simla Special.

Who are the singers of Look Love Me Dear?

The song is sung by S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and S. Janaki.

Who composed the music for Look Love Me Dear?

The music was composed by M. S. Viswanathan.

When was the song Look Love Me Dear released?

The song was released in the year 1982.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Look Love Me Dear from Simla Special is a romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. The song's soothing melody, combined with the heartfelt lyrics, evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. Sung by the legendary duo S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and S. Janaki, the track is a timeless classic that resonates with anyone who has experienced love. The music by M. S. Viswanathan adds a magical touch, making it perfect for romantic occasions and reflective moments.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Look Love Me Dear from the classic film Simla Special. This song beautifully captures the essence of romance with its soothing tunes and heartfelt lyrics. Dive into the nostalgia of the 80s with the magical voices of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and S. Janaki, set to the timeless music of M. S. Viswanathan.
stanzaMeanings: Look, love me dear, lovely figure, lasting color, come like a white cloud.
In my heart, silver dew, gentle breeze, sing like music.
Come searching for the honey-filled flower, I want to cuddle, come seeking.
In the blue sky, I see a pattern, a magic unseen for ages.
Thoughts of love are like a flowing river. The shy maiden shows her charm.
Today, the wind plays like a swing on the hair, isn't it?
Oh! Love me dear, never leave me, hold me forever, come like a white cloud.
In my heart, silver dew, gentle breeze, sing like music.
In the fragrance of jasmine, three hundred songs meet with the heart in rhythm.
When I speak a hundred words, the meaning is unclear, and the girl is restless.
The sky showers honey, I give everything, and you become poetry in this moment.
In my heart, silver dew, gentle breeze, sing like music.
Come searching for the honey-filled flower, I want to cuddle, come seeking.
